channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: 79 Granville Road 1- 16 Gateacre Court, 26th May
item.description:
A black sack of gas cannister have been dumped on the pavement out side of Gateacre Court and needs removing with a matter of urgency.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 26a, Granville Road, Albany Park, Sidcup, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Street weeding is required, 26th May
item.description:
The weeds are growing rapidly. Needs weeding very soon
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Astbury Road, Nunhead, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dead fox, 26th May
item.description:
Dead fox in the back garden of residents property.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Manor Close, Crayford, Greater London

item.title: 2 smashed panels, 26th May
item.description:
Front and side panes smashed bus stop V Erith Rd.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Erith Road, Lessness Heath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Damage - smashed glass or panels / jagged metal edges on shelter

item.title: Litter scattered on the street, 26th May
item.description:
Packaging from fast food outlet. Chicken boxes are on a regular display . Can someone investigate if signage can be used, or other means of keeping the street clean ? Xxxxx further down the street excessive amount of litter has been noted Blag bins opposite the arch company..

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Astbury Road, Nunhead, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish, 26th May
item.description:
Bins and rubbish everywhere, bin bags etc all ripped open
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 1, Newlands Park, Penge, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumping of chairs for a table on corner of house, 26th May
item.description:
4 chairs dumped outside this property. They sometimes fall and block main pathway and cars.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 7-10, George Groves Road, Anerley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 102 Chatsworth Road, 26th May
item.description:
102 Chatsworth Road Is wrong

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Chatsworth Road, Hackney, London

item.title: Black bin bags dumped outside 2A, 26th May
item.description:
Repeated dumping of rubbish outside this property. Dont use appropriate bins etc.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Belfast Road, Hackney, London

item.description:
Mattress blocking pathway outside bin shades 18 Block 18 Cook Square.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Cook Square, Slade Green, Greater London

item.title: Fly tipping and overflowing bins, 26th May
item.description:
Fly tipping and overflowing bins all around the bin area. Please arrange removal and for the street cleansing for the floors.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Pownall Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping clothes and food, 26th May
item.description:
Fly tipping of clothes and food on street near school. Food is starting to smell in the heat

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Alfearn Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Tree root damage, 26th May
item.description:
Tree roots are coming through pavement again and starting to damage my garden wall. I have more photos but system only allows one upload, have tried several times.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Birchwood Avenue, Elmers End, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Manor Road, Hackney, London

item.title: Multiple bags of rubbish dumped again, 26th May

More fly tipping again

item.title: Dead fox, 26th May
item.description:
Dead fox on the footway o/s 4 Long Lane. Please can we inspect
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Long Lane, Barnehurst, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Debris needs collected, 26th May
item.description:
This debris needs collected from carpark at 1-9/11-13. Note: It's not fly tipping. It was trapped behind a council fence, which broke off because of the pressure. (Residents cleaned, repaired and reattached fence to wall. )

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Shrubland Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Pothole outside 463 Blackfen Road. Reported 4 weeks ago, still not fixed., 26th May
item.description:
Pot hole outside 463 Blackfen Road was fixed but has now sunk. When busses and lorries go over it, it shakes my house and is causing internal cracking.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Blackfen Road, Blendon, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
